parameters.name: branchProvider
parameters.description: Provider for both independent quorum branch workers. Defaults to CODEX.

parameters.description: Model for both independent quorum branch workers. Defaults to gpt-5.

parameters.name: mergeProvider
parameters.description: Provider for the final quorum merge worker. Defaults to CODEX.

parameters.name: mergeModel
parameters.description: Model for the final quorum merge worker. Defaults to gpt-5.
